title: Soul Elytra
description:
Change the elytra based on the Soul Of Flight from Terraria. 
Glowing in the dark requires Optifine or ETF+Continuity
body:
![Player crouching to open the elytra while it glows in the dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776b8c62cd7dba7362d5b79969c1e5b121c2fd2f.png)

# Soul Elytra

Changes the elytra texture to a vibrant light blue based on the Soul Of Flight from Terraria.
Glows in the dark, looks great at night!

_(Also includes a version to change the name of the items to match the textures)_

## This pack changes:
- Elytra item
- Elytra model
- Phantom Membrane

_(check gallery to view the changes)_

## Optional requirements
Either optifine or ETF + Continuity, otherwise the textures won't glow
